# 🚀 Pull Request Request

## 📝 Description
Provide a brief summary of the changes introduced by this PR.

## 🛠️ Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 🧹 Refactor (code cleanup/improvement)
- [ ] 🔒 Security update
- [ ] 📚 Documentation

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's HUD aesthetic.
- [ ] I have tested the sync/scraping functionality.
- [ ] I have updated the `deadlines.json` if necessary (local dev only).
- [ ] I have verified the "Mark Done" detection.

## 📸 Screenshots (Optional)
If UI changes were made, add screenshots here.
